message:
fix(supply_chain): audit chain integrity after eviction + bounded recall_receipts in quarantine

Bug 1: verify_audit_integrity() always failed after push_bounded evicted
old audit entries — it expected the first entry's prev_hash to equal
genesis, but after eviction the first retained entry references its
evicted predecessor. Fixed by skipping genesis linkage check when
entry.sequence > 0 (indicates prior eviction).

Bug 2: record.recall_receipts.push(receipt) was unbounded, allowing
memory exhaustion if many nodes submit receipts. Changed to
push_bounded with MAX_RECALL_RECEIPTS cap.

Added 2 regression tests: audit_integrity_survives_eviction and
recall_receipts_bounded. All 22 quarantine tests pass.

Closes: bd-1iua

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
